## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO strategy and content performance for Firework, with a focus on lead generation and international expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent blog content underperforming in traffic and lead generation; need to revisit SEO strategy and content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Expanding focus on French and Spanish locales; requires tailored SEO approach for each market](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Implementing more targeted call-to-actions (CTAs) in blog posts to improve lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [GrowthX transitioning team; Megan and Jen to be new primary points of contact](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Recent blog posts not generating expected traffic or leads](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Older content (Q4/early Q1) still driving most engagement](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Need to investigate sudden drop in impressions and clicks over past 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Focus on generating leads specifically from the US market](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Aim: Publish content relevant to target audience (brands, retailers in fashion, beauty, electronics, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### SEO Strategy Overhaul

  - [Megan to conduct new SEO keyword research ensuring content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Implementing generative engine optimization to better surface Firework in searches](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities for more in-line CTAs to boost lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Cameron built logic for category-specific inline CTAs; potential for further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### International Expansion

  - [Recently launched French and Spanish locales on website](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Need solid strategy to drive SEO for these new markets](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Japanese site live but managed separately by local team](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Future plans include potential launch of 4 more locales by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Requirement: Develop replicable template for SEO success across all locales](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Megan to leverage 15 years of journalism experience to enhance content quality](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Focus on creating engaging, relevant content for Firework's ICP (brands, retailers)](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Ensure content resonates with target industries: fashion, beauty, apparel, electronics, home improvement](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Reporting and Metrics

  - [Ritesh to share HubSpot data on blog-generated leads](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Weekly analysis of leads, focusing on US-generated leads](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Track impressions, clicks, and overall performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Investigate reasons for recent drop in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

  - [Sam to review current blog CTAs and suggest updates for more relevant, recent content](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Megan to involve GrowthX's full-time SEO specialist in performance investigation](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Develop strategy for optimizing SEO across French and Spanish locales](https://fathom.video/share/KkdJ9HjUQZceKxJNQ9zFcrdt_K8Bypb6?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
